name: Macadamia Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first eight ingredients as suggested by the manufacturer's instructions for your bread machine.
2. Pour the mixture into the bread machine pan.
3. Select the basic bread setting on your machine.
4. Choose your desired crust color and loaf size according to the bread machine's directions.
5. Bake the bread following the machine's recommended settings.
6. Just before the final kneading stage (when the machine signals the fruit/nut phase), add the chopped macadamia nuts and flaked coconut to the batter.
